response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the full duration of the video (00:00 - 04:59). 2. Evaluated the audio content, which only contained Minecraft gameplay sound effects and the streamer's commentary. 3. Confirmed that there is no vocal music in this video.
response.global_summary: A continuous video clip of a VTuber playing Minecraft, focusing on farming activities and combat with mobs. There is no vocal music in the video.
